description: WALKABLE LOCATION. Welcome to Townsend.This bright 3 bedroom 1374 sqft home features stylish laminate flooring, updated lighting, custom woodwork, a convenient main floor powder room & private deck off the dining room.Gourmet kitchen features custom cabinetry, stainless steel appliances, a spacious island w/ engineered stone countertops.The primary bedroom offers a large walk through closet & a luxurious ensuite with a spa shower. 9 ft ceilings, lots of natural light. Tandem garage offers options. 5900sqft of incredible resort style amenities ! A great room lounge, a teen lounge area,  indoor kids play area, party room, outdoor workout area & dog wash. Steps from the YMCA, shopping &restaurants. Great for commuters with quick access to major routes.
